derived_fields.customer_brief: Days since last purchase: 182. Number of purchases: 2.0. Average order value: 197.55. Total revenue: 395.10. Tenure: 111 days. Customer type: repeat customer. Average days between orders is 111.0.

campaign.recommended_strategy: Acknowledge the lapse, re-introduce curated value and relevance, then escalate with a clear, time-bound recovery offer calibrated to AOV ($25 off $175+). Open with a light, margin-safe perk (free shipping threshold), follow with credibility and product curation, and close with urgency and a stronger incentive.
campaign.cta: Return with a limited-time reason to act
campaign.rationale: This customer purchased twice with a high AOV ($197.55) and has been inactive for 182 days—well beyond their typical 111-day gap—so churn risk is high. Medium discount sensitivity calls for a stepped approach: start with a soft, premium-friendly reason to revisit (free shipping over a healthy threshold) to protect margin, then reinforce relevance with curated value in their broad General Merchandise interest, and finally use a stronger, time-bound $-off incentive tuned to their AOV ($25 off $175+) to make conversion likely without over-discounting. The Day 1/5/10 cadence balances urgency with respect for inbox fatigue, while the tone stays relationship-aware and commercially focused.

emails.subject: It’s been a while—see what’s new
emails.body:
Hi there,

We haven’t seen you in a bit, and a lot has landed since your last order. If you’re refreshing the everyday, our latest selection spans smart, practical picks across General Merchandise—easy upgrades that make a difference from day one.

To make it simple to jump back in, enjoy free shipping on orders $150+ with code FREESHIP150 this week. It’s a straightforward nudge to restock what you need or try something new.

Take a look at what’s new and trending, and if something catches your eye, that shipping perk is waiting.

Shop new arrivals →

emails.subject: Here’s what’s worth a second look
emails.body:
Checking back in with a quick guide to what’s performing best right now. Since your last visit, we’ve refreshed core essentials and added thoughtful updates across everyday categories—pieces designed to work hard and look good without overthinking.

If you tend to mix a few items per order, this is a great moment to build your cart from our newest essentials and refreshed favorites. You’ll find clean designs, solid materials, and the kind of utility that earns a permanent spot in your routine.

Browse the latest picks, compare options side by side, and come back to it when you’re ready—your shortlist will still be there.

Explore what’s new →

emails.subject: 48 hours: $25 off $175+ to come back
emails.body:
We’d really like to have you back. For the next 48 hours, take $25 off $175+ with code COMEBACK25.

It’s a simple, one-time thank-you for past business—and a good excuse to check out the latest General Merchandise additions you may have missed. Build a cart that fits your routine, apply the code at checkout, and you’re set.

This offer expires soon. If you’ve been on the fence, now’s the moment to make it count.

Redeem COMEBACK25 →

campaign.segment_summary: Customer 12677 - At-Risk High-Value Buyer is a win_back segment with long inactive activity, medium purchase frequency, high order value, and medium engagement. Churn risk is high and discount sensitivity is medium. The likely business objective is win-back, centered on General Merchandise.
